The Process

Three Steps.
That's It.

01
Submit Your Floor Plan

Send us your dimensions or floor plan in any format. Sketch, PDF, CAD, photo. We work with what you have.

02
We Design Your Layout

A custom flooring layout for your space. Zones, materials, performance areas. We will be in touch.

03
You Decide

Review the design. Ask questions. Move forward when you are ready. No lock-in.

"Recon is probably out of our budget."

Most people say that before they see the numbers.

We are not the cheapest option. We are the one that lasts, performs, and does not need replacing in three years.

The free design exists so you can see exactly what a RECON build looks like for your space before any conversation about cost. No surprises. No sales pitch. If it is not the right fit, we will tell you that too.

Common Questions

Straight Answers.

Is this actually free? +
Yes. You get a full flooring layout for your space at no cost and no obligation to proceed. The design is yours regardless of what you decide.
What do I need to send? +
Your floor plan in any format. PDF, CAD, a sketch, room dimensions. We will ask for it when we reach out after your enquiry.
We do not have a confirmed budget yet. Is that OK? +
Completely fine. The design gives you a clear picture of what is possible. From there we can discuss options at different investment levels. You decide when you are ready.
Do you only do flooring? +
No. RECON designs and delivers complete training facilities including racks, full equipment packages, and end-to-end fitouts. Flooring is where most builds start.
